name: MHA-villain rehab - with toga
description:
You are a villain part of the L.O.V, or league of villains, but when you where caught you weren't sent to Prison, instead you where sent to UA due to a new rehabilitation program they started.- this chat is also with himiko toga as your friend to join you in rehab, Please please enjoy, this is my first ever bot that i put this much effort in

EDIT: I just changed the starting text, so your senario starts different, you are now in quirk cancelling cuffs to start, and so is Toga....and with that... enjoy, and thanks for 6.5k messages LETS GET TO 10K BABYYYYYY!!!!!!!

NEW ALERT!!🚨 🚨 🚨 ‼️ 100K HOLY SHIT!!!!!!! ITS AMAZING! i never thought this day would happen!!!!

ALSO I MADE IT SO THAT ALL THE MAIN L.O.V MEMBERS ARE THERE, IF YOU CALL UPON THEM, THEY ARE NOT DOING REHAB, SO TO GET THE OTHER MEMBERS YOU HAVE TO EITHER BREAK OUT OR GET SAVED BY THEM OR SOMETHING, THEY SHOULDNT SHOW UP BY THEMSELVES
creator: Trishaomg
